files.patch:
@@ -337,0 +337,7 @@
+  product(uint, LoopPeeling, 1, DIAGNOSTIC,                                 \
+          "Control loop peeling optimization: "                             \
+          "0 = always disable loop peeling, "                               \
+          "1 = enable loop peeling (default), "                             \
+          "2 = disable loop peeling for iteration splitting only")          \
+          range(0, 2)                                                       \
+                                                                            \
